dashboard.label: PhishIQPlus - Health
dashboard.description: Operational health and error visibility for PhishIQPlus enrichment.

search.query: index=$phishiqplus_internal_index$ sourcetype=$phishiqplus_internal_sourcetype$ event_type=run_summary | eval urls_total=coalesce(urls_total,0), urls_success=coalesce(urls_success,0), urls_failed=coalesce(urls_failed,0) | eval error=coalesce(client_metrics.last_error,"none"), status=coalesce(client_metrics.last_status,"") | table _time stanza api_base_url urls_total urls_success urls_failed cache_hits duration_ms error status degraded_mode

index=$phishiqplus_internal_index$ sourcetype=$phishiqplus_internal_sourcetype$ event_type=run_summary | timechart span=15m sum(urls_failed) as failed sum(urls_success) as success | eval error_rate=case((success+failed)>0, round((failed/(success+failed))*100,2), true(), 0) | fields _time error_rate
index=$phishiqplus_internal_index$ sourcetype=$phishiqplus_internal_sourcetype$ event_type=run_summary | timechart span=15m sum(client_metrics.circuit_open) as circuit_open
